backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for RK Overseas store with CRUD operations for products, categories, and inquiries, plus blob storage mixin inclusion.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (multi-page frontend, visual theme, static assets) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries for each frontend source file, describing their purpose and any notable fixes applied.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'RK Overseas' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Products, ProductDetail, Categories, Contact, and About pages inside a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the RK Overseas brand, quick navigation links, contact details, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper component that renders Navbar at the top, page content in the middle, and Footer at the bottom in a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with the RK Overseas logo, desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, a 'Shop Now' CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, category badge, stock status, brand, name, and price, navigating to the product detail page on click. Includes brand/category-based image lookup helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching products, categories, and search results from the backend actor, plus a mutation hook for submitting product inquiries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for the RK Overseas brand palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying company stats, mission, core values, supported brands, and commitments for the RK Overseas appliance business.
frontend/src/pages/Categories.tsx: Displays a grid of product categories with icons, gradient colors, and product counts, navigating to the filtered products page on click.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders a contact page with store information and a form for submitting product inquiries, using react-hook-form and a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero banner, feature highlights, and a grid of up to six featured products with category mapping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Shows detailed information for a single product including image, brand, stock status, and a link to contact for inquiries, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Lists all products with search input and category filter pills, filtering results client-side and syncing the selected category to the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the RK Overseas frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color tokens (brand charcoal/amber palette, semantic colors), border radius, box shadows, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 3) describing RK Overseas as a home appliances store frontend, listing existing features (multi-page site, visual theme, static image assets), required image assets with dimensions, and architectural/issue tracking fields.
